name: refill-countdown
title: Refill Countdown
description: Days-of-supply remaining as a depleting bar with the run-out date and an escalating tone.

props.name: daysRemaining
props.description: Days of supply left. Mutually exclusive with quantityRemaining/dailyUse.

props.name: quantityRemaining
props.description: Units left; combined with dailyUse to derive days.

props.name: dailyUse
props.description: Units consumed per day; required with quantityRemaining.

props.name: runOutDate
props.description: Explicit run-out date; derived from today + daysRemaining when omitted.

props.name: supplyDays
props.description: Full supply length; sets the depleting bar's baseline.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action slot, e.g. a Request refill button.

clinicalNotes: Count days of supply from the dispensed quantity and the sig (quantity ÷ daily use), not from calendar refill dates — a patient who doubles a PRN dose runs out early. Always show the run-out *date*, not just a number: patients plan around dates. Tone escalates at ≤7 days (warning) and ≤3 days (destructive), with a distinct out-of-supply state at 0. This is informational UI; it does not order refills or account for pharmacy lead time — surface the run-out date early enough for the caller's fulfilment workflow. The days-remaining and run-out date are exposed to screen readers as text via the card's label, so status is never conveyed by the bar color alone.
notes: medcn-original. Composes card + badge + button (action slot) + separator; derives days and run-out date when not given.
